name: Solo bout reports outcome and rewards before build adjustment

planSteps.description: Navigate to https://colosseum-survivors.pages.dev/?seed=42&fast=1
Enter TestSprite-3113 into the input with data-testid player-name
Click the button with data-testid confirm-player-name
Click the button with data-testid battle-open
The dialog with data-testid battle-modal is visible
Click the button with data-testid deploy-solo
The element with data-testid result-outcome contains DEFEATED AT followed by seconds or SURVIVED 180s
The element with data-testid result-score contains a number
The element with data-testid result-gold-ledger is visible
The element with data-testid result-gold-before contains a number
The element with data-testid result-gold-earned contains a number
The element with data-testid result-gold-after contains a number
The element with data-testid result-loot contains non-empty text
The element with data-testid result-rank-cell is not visible
The element with data-testid match-ranking-section is not visible
The element with data-testid leaderboard-section is not visible
The button with data-testid run-again is visible
The button with data-testid adjust-build is visible
Click the button with data-testid adjust-build
The button with data-testid guild-tab-training is visible
The button with data-testid guild-tab-training has aria-pressed true
The button with data-testid buy-atk is visible
